assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed. Line 37 has comment 'Removed AddDeveloperSigningCredential()'.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms with EcdsaSha256 (ES256) before RsaSha256 (RS256)
assertions.rationale: Lines 33-34 configure RS256 first ('RS256'), then ES256 ('ES256'). The order is reversed — assertion requires ES256 before RS256.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets KeyManagement.RotationInterval to 90 days and PropagationTime to 14 days
assertions.rationale: Lines 26-27 set RotationInterval = 90 days and PropagationTime = 14 days.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures DataProtectKeys = true for key management
assertions.rationale: DataProtectKeys is not set anywhere in the code.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToFileSystem and SetApplicationName
